name: L-2 fetcher detects local-LLM eligibility from .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm/status.json and labels summarizer accordingly per X-4 cross-reference
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm && printf '%s' '{"available":true}' > .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm/status.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'summarizer=local-llm' out.txt && echo local 1>&2
